description: Your traps gain a powerful final effect (Spike Surge, Flame Collapse, Cataclysm Blast, or Final Exposure).
tooltipTemplate: Traps gain a powerful final effect on expiry. Own a Bronze trap perk to see the specific payoff.

tooltipTemplateByTrap.caltrops: Spike Surge: on expiry, bursts for {spikeSurgeBurstDamage} damage and slows to {spikeSurgeSlowMultiplier%} of base speed for {spikeSurgeSlowDurationSeconds:1}s.
tooltipTemplateByTrap.explosive_trap: Cataclysm: each detonation triggers a secondary explosion at {cataclysmRadiusMultiplier+%} radius after {cataclysmSecondaryDelaySeconds:1}s — pairs with Aftershock for 4 total blasts.
tooltipTemplateByTrap.fire_pit: Flame Collapse: on expiry, collapses ({flameCollapseRadiusMultiplier+%} radius) for {flameCollapseDamage} damage and {flameCollapseBurnDamagePerSecond:1} burn DPS for {flameCollapseBurnDurationSeconds:1}s.
tooltipTemplateByTrap.marker_trap: Final Exposure: when a marked enemy leaves the zone, deal {finalExposureBurstDamage} damage to them and to every other enemy still carrying a mark from the same trap.
